summary: Tested ProjectGrid.jsx extraction and bulk select/delete feature. All features working correctly: Select button appears when projects exist, entering select mode shows checkboxes on tiles, Select All/Deselect All toggles work, Delete N button shows count, Cancel exits select mode. Credits modal and Core System button also verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjectGrid.jsx is well-structured at 352 lines - good extraction from Dashboard.jsx monolith
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Bulk delete uses native confirm() dialog - works but could be upgraded to custom modal for consistency
handleBulkDelete deletes projects sequentially (for loop with await) - could be parallelized with Promise.all for better performance with many projects
SELF_EDIT_TARGETS in constants.js correctly includes project_grid entry with path and description
context_for_next_testing_agent: ProjectGrid.jsx bulk select/delete feature is fully functional. Key test-ids: enter-select-mode-btn, select-all-btn, delete-selected-btn, cancel-select-btn, select-checkbox-{id}, project-card-{id}. The Select button only appears when cards.length > 0 (projects exist). Credits modal and Core System navigation also working.

select_button_visibility.note: Select button appears when projects exist (121 projects found)

enter_select_mode.note: Clicking Select button shows checkboxes on all 121 project cards

select_all_toggle.note: Select All selects all projects, button text changes to 'Deselect All'

delete_button_count.note: Delete button shows correct count (Delete 1, Delete 121)

cancel_select_mode.note: Cancel button exits select mode, checkboxes disappear, Select button returns

buy_credits_button.note: Credits modal opens with balance (27.50), cost per action, and purchase options

core_system_button.note: Core System button navigates to Core System Workspace

ui_verification.project_grid: PASS - Renders with hero headline, creative brief, project cards
ui_verification.bulk_select_controls: PASS - All buttons (Select, Select All, Delete N, Cancel) work correctly
ui_verification.credits_modal: PASS - Opens with balance, costs, and purchase options
ui_verification.core_system_navigation: PASS - Navigates to Core System Workspace
